response:
subject: Thank you for your assistance  

body:  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.  

I would like to clarify that the current machine vision system in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C. Based on the technical data attached to this email, the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor.  

Please refer to the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file for detailed specifications, and specifically to page 18 for the datasheet. For the quantum efficiency, please consult the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, page 13.  

I will review these files and manuals more carefully and will get back to you with further details.  

Thank you again for your support.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
